default_binding.THRESHOLD: the last northbound overnight train of the season
default_binding.GOAL: the question the whole train seems built around
default_binding.TONE_MOTIF: the carriage sways and the cold glass holds her reflection over the dark
default_binding.G0A0_CHAR: the night conductor and his silver punch-clock
default_binding.G0A1_CHAR: the long row of curtained sleeper berths
default_binding.G0A2_CHAR: the letter a stranger left folded on the seat
default_binding.G0A3_CHAR: the black country sliding past the window
default_binding.G1A0_CHAR: the dining-car regulars who never seem to order
default_binding.G1A1_CHAR: the small child awake at the end of the carriage
default_binding.G1A2_CHAR: the man softly counting stations that never come
default_binding.G1A3_CHAR: the woman in grey travelling in mourning
default_binding.G2A0_CHAR: the conductor pressed a second time near the tunnel
default_binding.G2A1_CHAR: the faint map inked in the margins of the letter
default_binding.G2A2_CHAR: the signal lamps burning ahead of the tunnel mouth
default_binding.G2A3_CHAR: the passengers gathered to weigh the choice together
default_binding.G3A0_CHAR: the conductor at last willing to explain the north line
default_binding.G3A1_CHAR: the wakeful child offering to show the way through
default_binding.G3A2_CHAR: the mourning woman's quiet request to carry a message on
default_binding.G3A3_CHAR: the timetable whose columns of stations never end
default_binding.R_PEACE_CHAR: the plain act of riding on, wide awake
default_binding.R_HELP_CHAR: the traveler at the carriage end who needs a hand
default_binding.R_TRUTH_CHAR: the last unread lines of the stranger's letter
default_binding.R_LEAVE_CHAR: the cold vestibule door and the idea of stepping down

slots.meaning: The lone adult protagonist riding the train.
slots.guidance: A single traveler's full name; capable, observant, alone for the night.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded journey/vehicle the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: A single overnight vehicle or passage running on a fixed, rare schedule; uncanny but never actually dangerous to be aboard.

slots.meaning: The boarding point / the single place the hero can return to.
slots.guidance: Always reachable; a retreat or early ending returns here, safely.

slots.meaning: The condition/moment that makes this journey possible at all.
slots.guidance: A recurring, non-lethal seasonal or weather condition that opens the one-night window.

slots.meaning: The mid-journey pressure point/obstacle the whole story builds toward.
slots.guidance: A survivable structural chokepoint (a tunnel, a border, a crossing); passing it is a decision point, never a lethal hazard.

slots.meaning: The escalating visible sign that the deadline/climax is near.
slots.guidance: A gradual, benign visual cue (dawn light, a brightening horizon) that gives fair warning as the night runs out.

slots.meaning: The recurring phrase for the story's central unanswered question.
slots.guidance: Stated the same way every time it recurs; never resolved by force, only by understanding.

slots.meaning: The recurring sensory/atmosphere beat that opens every vignette.
slots.guidance: A calm, uncanny-not-frightening sensory anchor (motion, cold glass, reflection); wonder over dread.

slots.meaning: The mysterious ultimate destination that never quite arrives.
slots.guidance: Named consistently; its non-arrival is eerie, never a source of real danger or despair.

slots.meaning: The full recurring focus of n_start branch A: the conductor thread (G0A0), as used in its beats.
slots.guidance: A short, specific noun phrase naming a person or detail aboard the train; benign, non-threatening, safe to look closely at.

slots.meaning: The short choice-label form of n_start branch A: the conductor thread (G0A0).
slots.guidance: A brief noun phrase (label-length); must read as distinct from its sibling choices at the same fork.

slots.meaning: The resolution-arc focus for the 'stay present' choice.
slots.guidance: An inward, benign act (not a person or object); calm, not passive.

slots.meaning: The resolution-arc focus for the 'help a fellow traveler' choice.
slots.guidance: A fellow passenger in need of a small kindness; never a source of peril.

slots.meaning: The short choice-label form of the 'help' resolution focus.
slots.guidance: Brief; matches the traveler-in-need framing.

slots.meaning: The resolution-arc focus for the 'chase the truth' choice.
slots.guidance: An unfinished piece of the story's own mystery (a letter, a record); readable, not hazardous.

slots.meaning: The short choice-label form of the 'truth' resolution focus.
slots.guidance: Brief; matches the unfinished-mystery framing.

slots.meaning: The resolution-arc focus for the 'try to leave' choice.
slots.guidance: A literal exit point (a door, a hatch); always physically safe to use.

slots.meaning: Ending title: g3a1_end (positive completion).
slots.guidance: A short, evocative title naming this ending; the position's fixed ending is always non-lethal and non-graphic, so the title must read that way too.
